sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_split (id Int32, data String);
INSERT INTO test_split (id, data) VALUES (1, 'hello, world, test');
SELECT splitByString(', ', data) FROM test_split WHERE id = 1;
UPDATE test_split SET data = 'foo, bar, baz, qux' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT splitByString(', ', data, 2) FROM test_split WHERE id = 1;
